name: wealthflow
description: WealthFlow Elite Financial System v7.9 — Gmail-auto-sync personal finance with one-click bank-email ingestion, 250+ merchant intelligence DB, time-bucketed allocation (each tx in its correct month/year), multi-bank parser (15 SL + 20 international banks), AES-256-GCM credential vault, 18-engine AI vision consensus, multi-lingual advisor, FIFO credit-card reconciliation, and predictive wealth forecasting. Built for the Sri Lankan market with international reach.
